title: Cultural & Heritage Tour
description: Immerse yourself in 2,500 years of Sri Lankan civilisation — from the legendary rock fortress of Sigiriya to the sacred sanctuaries of Kandy and the golden age ruins of Anuradhapura.
highlights: Temple of the Sacred Tooth, Kandy

title: Adventure Tour
description: For the thrill-seeker — summit sacred peaks, trek through ancient rainforests and challenge yourself against Sri Lanka's spectacular highland terrain with expert adventure guides.

title: Soft Adventure Tour
description: Gentle thrills for families and groups — experience the excitement of white-water rafting, scenic river walks and tranquil nature in Sri Lanka's beautiful river valleys.
highlights: Suitable for All Ages & Fitness Levels

title: Bird Watching Tour
description: Sri Lanka is home to 430+ bird species, including 33 endemics. Explore world-class birding hotspots across rainforests, national parks and wetlands with specialist ornithologist guides.

title: Wildlife Safari Tour
description: Track leopards, spot wild elephants in their hundreds and encounter a breathtaking diversity of wildlife across Sri Lanka's top national parks with experienced naturalist guides.

title: Coastal & Southern Highlights
description: Discover Sri Lanka's stunning southern coast — from the colonial grandeur of Galle Fort to whale watching at Mirissa and turtle conservation at Kosgoda.
